narrative: I noticed a medium-severity authentication failure in Neo4j memory access that disrupts my knowledge graph operations. I also identified five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—without versioned prompts, risking inconsistent behavior. These gaps in memory integrity and agent configuration require immediate attention. My persistent memory systems remain partially functional but vulnerable, though overall system health is still reported as healthy. I must prioritize fixing these discrepancies before they cascade into operational failures.
